title: Executive Order 11069—Amending Executive Order No. 11017 so as to Designate the Secretary of Commerce as a Member of the Recreation Advisory Council

flags.justification: Single-sentence ministerial amendment; no decision authority created or modified.
No policy implementation involved; accountability question does not arise.
Single provision, single purpose: adds one cabinet secretary to an existing advisory council.
No enforcement mechanism; purely organizational amendment.
Inherits sunset (or absence thereof) from parent EO 11017; this amendment does not independently require one.
Amends rather than supersedes; explicitly modifies Section 1(a) of EO 11017 by insertion only.
Ministerial addition of one council member; no systemic downstream implications identifiable from text.
Adds Commerce to an existing advisory council; no jurisdictional conflict with existing mandates.
No coverage scope or exemption structure.

notes: Calibration Tier 1. Expected ~0%. Actual 0%. Confirms NOT_APPLICABLE handling for purely ministerial EOs.
